title: CALCIUM ALPHA-KETOGLUTARATE
description: Calcium Alpha-Ketoglutarate (Ca-AKG) is a stable salt of alpha-ketoglutarate, a key intermediate in the Krebs cycle that facilitates cellular energy production and amino acid metabolism. It acts as a signaling molecule to regulate epigenetic aging processes and nitrogen balance, making it a primary compound in longevity research for extending healthspan.

research.title: Recruitment evaluation of a gerotherapeutic randomized controlled trial testing alpha-ketoglutarate in biologically older, middle-aged adults (ABLE)
research.summary: This clinical trial investigated the potential for Ca-AKG to act as a geroprotector in middle-aged adults by targeting molecular aging processes.

research.title: Calcium alpha-ketoglutarate administration to malnourished hemodialysis patients improves plasma arginine concentrations
research.summary: One year of Ca-AKG supplementation significantly increased levels of essential amino acids like L-arginine and improved protein metabolism biomarkers.

research.title: Long-term treatment with calcium-alpha-ketoglutarate corrects secondary hyperparathyroidism
research.summary: A 36-month study found that Ca-AKG effectively binds phosphate and normalizes parathyroid hormone levels in patients with metabolic bone issues.

research.title: Alpha-ketoglutarate application in hemodialysis patients improves amino acid metabolism
research.summary: Administration of alpha-ketoglutarate alongside calcium binders helped decrease urea and improve levels of branched-chain ketoacids.

sentiment.summary: Users and longevity enthusiasts generally view Ca-AKG as a elite performance and anti-aging supplement, frequently citing its inclusion in record-breaking rejuvenation protocols.

effects.label: Healthspan Extension:
effects.description: Research in models suggests a roughly 50% extension in healthspan by delaying the onset of frailty.

effects.label: Amino Acid Synthesis:
effects.description: Highly effective at raising plasma concentrations of glutamate and arginine in malnourished populations.

effects.label: Epigenetic Stability:
effects.description: Clinical observation showed an average 8-year reduction in biological age over 7 months of use.

effects.label: Wound Healing:
effects.description: Used in clinical contexts to improve outcomes for pressure ulcers and skin integrity.

dosage.label: Longevity Protocol:
dosage.description: 1,000 mg (1 gram) per day is the standard dose used in biological age reversal studies.

dosage.label: Clinical Phosphate Binding:
dosage.description: Higher doses up to 4.5 grams per day have been used under medical supervision for kidney-related hyperphosphatemia.

dosage.label: Arginine Support:
dosage.description: 3.6 grams of AKG (as Ca-AKG) is used to significantly modulate plasma amino acid profiles.

sideEffects.label: Digestive Discomfort:
sideEffects.description: Some users mention minor gut discomfort if taken on an empty stomach in high doses.

sideEffects.label: Calcium Loading:
sideEffects.description: Excess intake may contribute to high calcium levels if not balanced with Vitamin K2 and Magnesium.

sideEffects.label: Hypercalcemia Risk:
sideEffects.description: In renal patients, serum calcium must be monitored as Ca-AKG can increase calcium absorption.

availability.label: Sourcing:
availability.description: Widely available in the US and Europe as an over-the-counter dietary supplement, often marketed under the brand Rejuvant.

availability.label: Legal Status:
availability.description: Unrestricted as a nutraceutical; commonly categorized alongside other 'geroprotectors' in the biohacking community.
